message:
feat(tui): add Main mode detail pane scrolling and close 3 audit beads

Main mode detail pane was the only view without scroll support, forcing
operators to switch to Board mode to read long issues. Add Ctrl+j/k
(3-line) and Ctrl+d/u (10-line) scroll with footer hint, reset on
selection change, and 5 focused regression tests.

Also closes 3 P0 audit beads:
- bd-2bpl.3.1: main-view workflow audit (18 gaps documented)
- bd-2bpl.3.3: history mode audit (13 gaps documented)
- bd-2bpl.4.2: preview/watch/wizard audit (15 gaps documented)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ bvr | mode=Main | focus=detail | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=default | ? help
 │                                            ││   + 2026-01-03 Issue B created                                         │
 │                                            ││                                                                        │
 └────────────────────────────────────────────┘└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
-b/i/g/h modes | / search | s default | p hints | C copy | x export | O edit
+b/i/g/h modes | / search | s default | p hints | C copy | x export | O edit | ^j/k scroll
 
 --- Step 3: board_entry ---
 bvr | mode=Board | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=default | ? help | Tab focus |

@@ -10,25 +10,25 @@ bvr | mode=Main | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=default | ? help |
 │   arrows       Move selection up/down            |   n/N          Next/prev search match         │
 │   h/l          Lateral nav (lanes, peers)        |   Tab          Cycle search mode (in /)       │
 │   Ctrl+d/u     Jump down/up by 10                |   Esc          Cancel search                  │
-│   PgUp/PgDn    Jump by 10                        |   Enter        Confirm search                 │
-│   Home/End     Jump to top/bottom                |                                               │
-│   G            Jump to bottom                    | [Actions]                                     │
-│   Tab          Toggle list/detail focus          |   p            Toggle priority hints          │
-│   J/K          Navigate deps in detail           |   C            Copy issue ID                  │
-│   Enter        Return to main / drill            |   x            Export issue markdown          │
-│   scroll       Mouse wheel scrolls list          |   O            Open in editor                 │
-│                                                  |   Ctrl+R/F5    Refresh from disk              │
-│ [Views]                                          |                                               │
-│   a            Toggle actionable mode            | [History]                                     │
-│   b            Toggle board mode                 |   c            Cycle confidence filter        │
-│   i            Toggle insights mode              |   y            Copy SHA/ID                    │
-│   g            Toggle graph mode                 |   o            Open commit in browser         │
-│   h            Toggle history mode               |   f            Toggle file tree               │
-│   !            Toggle attention mode             |                                               │
-│   T            Toggle tree view                  | [Board]                                       │
-│   [            Toggle label dashboard            |   1-4          Jump to lane                   │
-│   ]            Toggle flow matrix                |   H/L          First/last lane                │
-│   v            History: bead/git toggle          |   0/$          First/last in lane             │
+│   Ctrl+j/k     Scroll detail pane                |   Enter        Confirm search                 │
+│   PgUp/PgDn    Jump by 10                        |                                               │
+│   Home/End     Jump to top/bottom                | [Actions]                                     │
+│   G            Jump to bottom                    |   p            Toggle priority hints          │
+│   Tab          Toggle list/detail focus          |   C            Copy issue ID                  │
+│   J/K          Navigate deps in detail           |   x            Export issue markdown          │
+│   Enter        Return to main / drill            |   O            Open in editor                 │
+│   scroll       Mouse wheel scrolls list          |   Ctrl+R/F5    Refresh from disk              │
+│                                                  |                                               │
+│ [Views]                                          | [History]                                     │
+│   a            Toggle actionable mode            |   c            Cycle confidence filter        │
+│   b            Toggle board mode                 |   y            Copy SHA/ID                    │
+│   i            Toggle insights mode              |   o            Open commit in browser         │
+│   g            Toggle graph mode                 |   f            Toggle file tree               │
+│   h            Toggle history mode               |                                               │
+│   !            Toggle attention mode             | [Board]                                       │
+│   T            Toggle tree view                  |   1-4          Jump to lane                   │
+│   [            Toggle label dashboard            |   H/L          First/last lane                │
+│   ]            Toggle flow matrix                |   0/$          First/last in lane             │
 │                                                                                                  │
 └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
 ? or Esc close | j/k scroll | Ctrl+d/u page | line 1/37
